receive = Task("receive_invoice", "Receive Invoice", task_type="user")

process.add(archive)
process.add(end)

process = Process("Data Processing Workflow with Error Check")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

# Tasks
load = Task("load_data", "Load Data", task_type="user")
transform = Task("transform_data", "Transform Data", task_type="script")
save = Task("save_data", "Save", task_type="service")
log_error = Task("log_error", "Log Error", task_type="user")

# Gateways
gw_check = Gateway("gw_check", "Error Check", gateway_type="exclusive")
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Join", gateway_type="exclusive")

# Flows
f1 = SequenceFlow(start, load)
f2 = SequenceFlow(load, transform)
f3 = SequenceFlow(transform, gw_check)
f4 = SequenceFlow(gw_check, save)       # success path
f5 = SequenceFlow(gw_check, log_error)  # error path
f6 = SequenceFlow(save, gw_join)

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Approval Process - Split/Join")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

# Tasks and events
submit = Task("submit_application", "Submit Application", task_type="user")
check_credit = Task("check_credit", "Check Credit", task_type="service")

# Join before decision to avoid a gateway acting as both join and split
review_join = Gateway("gw_review_join", "Review Join", gateway_type="exclusive")
# Decision split
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Decision", gateway_type="exclusive")

# Approved path
generate_offer = Task("generate_offer", "Generate Offer", task_type="service")

# Review needed path
wait_docs = IntermediateCatchEvent("wait_docs", "Wait for Docs", event_type="message")
re_evaluate = Task("re_evaluate", "Re-evaluate", task_type="user")

# Rejected path
notify_rejection = Task("notify_rejection", "Notify Rejection", task_type="service")

# Result join before ending
result_join = Gateway("gw_result_join", "Result Join", gateway_type="exclusive")

# Flows
f1 = SequenceFlow(start, submit)
f2 = SequenceFlow(submit, check_credit)
f3 = SequenceFlow(check_credit, review_join)
f4 = SequenceFlow(review_join, decision)

# Decision branches

f6 = SequenceFlow(decision, wait_docs)          # review needed
f7 = SequenceFlow(decision, notify_rejection)   # rejected

# Review loop back

f9 = SequenceFlow(re_evaluate, review_join)

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Customer Support Escalation")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

# Tasks and intermediate events
receive = Task("receive_ticket", "Receive Ticket", task_type="user")
immediate_response = Task("immediate_response", "Immediate Response", task_type="user")
wait_assignment = IntermediateCatchEvent("wait_assignment", "Wait for Assignment", event_type="timer")
assign_agent = Task("assign_agent", "Assign Agent", task_type="service")
process_req = Task("process_request", "Process Request", task_type="user")
close_ticket = Task("close_ticket", "Close Ticket", task_type="user")
escalate = Task("escalate", "Escalate", task_type="user")
manager_review = Task("manager_review", "Manager Review", task_type="user")

# Gateways
priority_split = Gateway("gw_priority_split", "Priority Split", gateway_type="exclusive")
priority_join = Gateway("gw_priority_join", "Priority Join", gateway_type="exclusive")
sat_split = Gateway("gw_sat_split", "Satisfaction Check", gateway_type="exclusive")
sat_join = Gateway("gw_sat_join", "Satisfaction Join", gateway_type="exclusive")

# Flows
f1 = SequenceFlow(start, receive)
f2 = SequenceFlow(receive, priority_split)

# High priority path -> join
f3 = SequenceFlow(priority_split, immediate_response)
f4 = SequenceFlow(immediate_response, priority_join)

# Normal priority path -> timer -> assign -> process -> satisfaction split
f5 = SequenceFlow(priority_split, wait_assignment)
f6 = SequenceFlow(wait_assignment, assign_agent)
f7 = SequenceFlow(assign_agent, process_req)
f8 = SequenceFlow(process_req, sat_split)

# Satisfaction branches
f9 = SequenceFlow(sat_split, close_ticket)     # satisfied
f10 = SequenceFlow(sat_split, escalate)        # not satisfied

# Escalation path to join
f11 = SequenceFlow(close_ticket, sat_join)
f12 = SequenceFlow(escalate, manager_review)
f13 = SequenceFlow(manager_review, sat_join)

# From satisfaction join to priority join
f14 = SequenceFlow(sat_join, priority_join)

# End
f15 = SequenceFlow(priority_join, end)

# Assemble
process.add(start)
process.add(end)
process.add(receive)
process.add(immediate_response)
process.add(wait_assignment)
process.add(assign_agent)
process.add(process_req)
process.add(close_ticket)
process.add(escalate)
process.add(manager_review)
process.add(priority_split)
process.add(priority_join)
process.add(sat_split)
process.add(sat_join)

process.add(f1)
process.add(f2)
process.add(f3)
process.add(f4)
process.add(f5)
process.add(f6)
process.add(f7)
process.add(f8)
process.add(f9)
process.add(f10)
process.add(f11)
process.add(f12)
process.add(f13)
process.add(f14)
process.add(f15)
